title: Research DocuSeal fork network for integrable features; report + epics/issues
Completion watermark (timestamp + SHA-256 hash) on signed documents — DocuSign parity
description: Stamp every page of completed/signed documents with a bottom footer: Document ID + completion timestamp (UTC) + SHA-256 hash of the pre-stamp signed PDF bytes. On by default, account-config toggle. Design doc: docs/plans/2026-07-13-completion-watermark-design.md

title: Core watermark stamping in GenerateResultAttachments (hash + timestamp + ID footer, metadata)
description: In lib/submissions/generate_result_attachments.rb build_pdf_attachment: serialize filled PDF, SHA-256 the bytes, draw 2-line footer on every page (HexaPDF overlay canvas, white underlay), store watermark_sha256 in attachment metadata. Stack above signature-ID stamp when both enabled. TDD: new spec/lib/submissions/generate_result_attachments_spec.rb

title: Account config toggle (with_completion_watermark, default on) + esign settings UI + i18n
description: New AccountConfig::WITH_COMPLETION_WATERMARK_KEY, default enabled (value != false). Toggle in app/views/esign_settings/show.html.erb mirroring with_signature_id pattern. i18n labels for all locales in config/locales/i18n.yml

title: Audit trail: record stamped watermark SHA-256 for verification
description: Show metadata['watermark_sha256'] in the documents table of Submissions::GenerateAuditTrail so the stamped hash is verifiable against a trusted record
